chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 912 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3913/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 26.06.2025 M/s Nazir Ahmed Junejo and Farzand Ali Maitlo, Advocates for petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General along with SIP Allah Ando Junejo of Police Station Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Muhammad Akram Jhamat, Advocate, file vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, while learned Additional Prosecutor General files statements on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 and 4, which are taken on record. Investigating Officer of the subject crime is present and submits that he has recorded statement of alleged abductee Mst. Misbah Kanwal (Petitioner No.2) under Section 161, Cr.P.C., wherein she has categorically stated that, being sui juris, she has contracted marriage with Nadar Ali Cheema (Petitioner No.1) with her own freewill and without any coercion. She has further stated that she was neither abducted nor enticed by anyone, and the FIR bearing Crime No.81 of 2025 registered at Police Station Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur, by her father Allah Ditta (Respondent No.5) is false and baseless. Investigating Officer, placing on record a copy of the said statement of petitioner No.2, further submits that he will present a copy of the same with his report before the concerned Judicial Magistrate, who will pass an appropriate order in accordance with law.

She has further stated that she was neither abducted nor enticed by anyone, and the FIR bearing Crime No.81 of 2025 registered at Police Station Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur, by her father Allah Ditta (Respondent No.5) is false and baseless. Investigating Officer, placing on record a copy of the said statement of petitioner No.2, further submits that he will present a copy of the same with his report before the concerned Judicial Magistrate, who will pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. It is, however, pointed out that the subject FIR also contains allegations regarding the abduction of C. P. No. D – 912 of 2025 Page 2 of 2 Javeria, daughter of the complainant (Respondent No.5). In this respect, the Investigating Officer shall continue the investigation and, upon completion, submit his report in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with the listed application. However, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when required. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
